flags.concern: Effect metadata: the plan does not implement the user-requested generated descriptions end-to-end. It adds no `description` field to `ParameterDefinition`, does not ask the edge function for an effect-level description, and does not replace the current save path that persists `description` from the mutable prompt textbox.
flags.evidence: `EffectMetadata` currently only stores a single `description` string ([useResources.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/features/resources/hooks/useResources.ts#L78)); the generator prompt only returns code today ([templates.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.ts#L26), [templates.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.ts#L88)); and `EffectCreatorPanel` clears `prompt` after generation then saves `description: prompt.trim()` ([EffectCreatorPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/EffectCreatorPanel.tsx#L227), [EffectCreatorPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/EffectCreatorPanel.tsx#L243), [EffectCreatorPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/EffectCreatorPanel.tsx#L279)).

flags.concern: Clip effect state: the plan says per-clip params live in `clip.entrance.params` / `exit.params` / `continuous.params`, but it does not cover how default values get written when a user selects or creates a parameterized effect. In the current repo, all effect-apply paths only write `{type,duration}` or `{type,intensity}`.
flags.evidence: `EffectCreatorPanel` only reports `(resourceId, category)` on save ([EffectCreatorPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/EffectCreatorPanel.tsx#L39)); `ClipPanel`'s dropdowns and `onSaved` callback replace effect objects without any params payload ([ClipPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/ClipPanel.tsx#L133), [ClipPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/ClipPanel.tsx#L170), [ClipPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/ClipPanel.tsx#L207), [ClipPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/ClipPanel.tsx#L260)); bulk editing does the same ([BulkClipPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/BulkClipPanel.tsx#L251), [BulkClipPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/BulkClipPanel.tsx#L280), [BulkClipPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/BulkClipPanel.tsx#L307)).

flags.concern: Properties panel: the plan wires parameter controls only into `ClipPanel`, but the actual properties surface swaps to `BulkClipPanel` whenever multiple clips are selected. That leaves parameterized effects unsupported in an existing editing mode.
flags.evidence: `PropertiesPanel` renders `BulkClipPanel` instead of `ClipPanel` for multi-selection ([PropertiesPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/PropertiesPanel.tsx#L121)); `BulkClipPanel` already exposes bulk entrance/exit/continuous selectors ([BulkClipPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/BulkClipPanel.tsx#L246)). Step 10 of the plan only mentions `ClipPanel`, so the bulk path is unaddressed.
